creator: sirdice@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 201251
svn diff update to 1.7.2

Distfiles moved to Github (original site is still https://www.webtrees.net ), Makefile and pkg-plist required a few changes for the new version. 

I tried to use GH_ACCOUNT instead of setting MASTER_SITES but this only gave me the source code. It was missing a lot of additional data files which used to be included in the original zip file of the previous versions too. This was the only way I could figure out that worked. If there's a better way I'd be happy to update the patch.

I've the update running on my own site for a week now and so far I haven't encountered any serious issues.

https://github.com/fisharebest/webtrees/releases/tag/1.7.12


Thanks.

Remko C.
